name: Community
short: Quiet, peer-driven recognition with a monthly recap.
description: A subtle alternative to leveling systems. Members star great messages (The Fridge) and thank each other (High Fives), and the bot quietly tracks who's a regular. Nothing spams chat — the bot just adds a small reaction to acknowledge, then celebrates everything once a month in a single warm Recap post. No per-message XP, no level-up spam, everything opt-out.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord user IDs together with recognition data: message IDs and reaction counts for starred messages, high-five (reputation) counts, and the calendar dates a member was active. No message content is stored. A user's data is removed on a Red data-deletion request.
install_msg: Community loaded. It runs quietly out of the box. Set a recap channel with `[p]community set recapchannel #channel`, then review everything with `[p]community set show`.
